raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"The section foregrounds a thesis (lack of standard measure), a gap statement (no community convergence), and a contribution claim (α_ML); any review must assess whether these are coherent, accurate, and well-scoped.","R1.2":"The section makes technical claims about plugging modality-specific δ functions into Krippendorff's formulation; logical soundness of the derivation—whether the Jaccard distance is well-defined inside that formulation, whether the chance-correction remains valid—is central to evaluating the section.","R1.3":"The section asserts that α_ML 'produces values broadly consistent with previously reported agreement statistics' on three corpora, but no tables or figures are present in the excerpt; a reviewer must flag whether empirical support is actually provided or merely promised."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should this review focus primarily on technical and scientific validity (logical soundness of the α_ML formulation and evidence-claim alignment), or on editorial quality (writing clarity, prose, and flow)?"}

rationale.R1.1: The section foregrounds a thesis (lack of standard measure), a gap statement (no community convergence), and a contribution claim (α_ML); any review must assess whether these are coherent, accurate, and well-scoped.
rationale.R1.2: The section makes technical claims about plugging modality-specific δ functions into Krippendorff's formulation; logical soundness of the derivation—whether the Jaccard distance is well-defined inside that formulation, whether the chance-correction remains valid—is central to evaluating the section.
rationale.R1.3: The section asserts that α_ML 'produces values broadly consistent with previously reported agreement statistics' on three corpora, but no tables or figures are present in the excerpt; a reviewer must flag whether empirical support is actually provided or merely promised.

parsed.clarification_question: Should this review focus primarily on technical and scientific validity (logical soundness of the α_ML formulation and evidence-claim alignment), or on editorial quality (writing clarity, prose, and flow)?
